recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: Penoza: The Final Chapter

recommendations.title: The Return of Don Camillo
recommendations.overview: Energetic priest Don Camillo returns to the town of Brescello for more political and personal duels with Communist mayor Peppone.

recommendations.title: Free Fall

recommendations.title: Welcome, or No Trespassing
recommendations.overview: Children rebel against the strict rules and regulations they face during their time in a Communist Young Pioneer camp.

recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Comedy, Adventure, Science Fiction
